description: Fielding formations referencing master position IDs. 11 Players per formation (Bowler + WK + 9 Fielders).

fieldDimensions.description: Reference dimensions only. Coordinates derived from fielding-positions-complete.json

attacking_pace_cordon.name: Attacking: Classic Pace Cordon
attacking_pace_cordon.description: Aggressive new ball field. 3 Slips and a Gully. Only 2 fielders on boundary.

attacking_off_trap.name: Attacking: Off-Side Trap
attacking_off_trap.description: Heavy off-side presence for swing bowling. 2 Slips and a packed off-side ring.

attacking_spin_web.name: Attacking: Subcontinental Spin
attacking_spin_web.description: Close catchers for turning ball. Slip, Silly Point, and Short Leg active.

attacking_bouncer_trap.name: Attacking: Bodyline Press
attacking_bouncer_trap.description: Short ball strategy. Leg slip and Leg Gully in place to catch gloved pulls.

attacking_powerplay_press.name: Attacking: Powerplay Press
attacking_powerplay_press.description: Modern T20 Powerplay. 1 Slip, energetic ring fielders stopping singles.

neutral_orthodox.name: Neutral: Orthodox
neutral_orthodox.description: Balanced Test/ODI field. 1 Slip, 3 boundary riders for control.

neutral_spin_squeeze.name: Neutral: Spin Squeeze
neutral_spin_squeeze.description: Middle overs spin. 4 boundary riders to encourage risk, no close catchers.

neutral_ring_field.name: Neutral: The Ring
neutral_ring_field.description: No slips. Spread fielders on the 30-yard circle to cut off singles.

neutral_angle_control.name: Neutral: Angle Control
neutral_angle_control.description: For angled seamers. Protection behind square on both sides.

neutral_middle_overs.name: Neutral: Middle Overs
neutral_middle_overs.description: Standard containment. 4 deep, strong V protection.

defensive_wide_yorker.name: Defensive: Off-Side Wide
defensive_wide_yorker.description: Death overs strategy for wide yorkers. Packed off-side boundary.

defensive_straight_lines.name: Defensive: Straight Hit
defensive_straight_lines.description: Protection against straight lofted drives. Long On, Long Off, and Cow Corner.

defensive_short_ball.name: Defensive: Back of a Length
defensive_short_ball.description: Protection against pulls and hooks. Leg side boundary packed.

defensive_round_wicket.name: Defensive: Round the Wicket
defensive_round_wicket.description: Anti-slog field. Sweepers on both sides of the wicket.

defensive_ring_fence.name: Defensive: The Ring Fence
defensive_ring_fence.description: Total defense. 5 fielders deep spread evenly to prevent boundaries.
